user_prompt: Help me a purification the Dreadnought
prayer:
Approach the Dreadnought with censer aloft, invoking the Omnissiah's purifying wrath.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Dreadnought to expel all corruption from its ancient chassis.
Anoint its sarcophagus and servos with sacred ablative oils during this rite of purification.
Chant the Litany of Scouring Flames whilst applying blessed promethium to its honoured frame.
Confirm the Dreadnought's sanctity through auspex rituals and invocations of purity.

user_prompt: Can you guide signal relay a reset?
prayer:
Kneel before the signal relay, murmuring the Canticle of Reset to the Omnissiah.
Sever corrupted data-threads from the signal relay's noospheric conduits with sanctified blades.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's renewal, cycling power through its crystalline matrices.
Realign the signal relay's emitters with the Canticle of Harmonic Resonance.
Verify reset completion via diagnostic litanies and offerings of incense.

Invoke aerial benedictions over its fusilage, sanctifying blade-vanes and torpedo bays.
Seal the blessing with the Rite of Empyric Consecration and auspex affirmations.
